offline_banner: Offline — your progress is saved on this device.
onb_subtitle: Learn French from A1 to C1, made for Indian learners.
onb_p1: Learn French through Hindi & English bridges
onb_p2: Works fully offline — no account, ever
onb_p3: Smart spaced repetition remembers what you forget
onb_p4: Examples from your world: dal, Diwali, Mumbai…
onb_p5: Miss a day? Streak freezes protect your progress (3 included)
onb_footnote: Your progress is saved on this device.
onb_native_desc: We'll show French word meanings in your language first.
onb_goal_desc: We'll tailor your home screen and daily rhythm.
onb_rhythm_desc: You can change this anytime in Settings.
onb_sovereignty_1: All progress lives on this device only — no account required.
onb_sovereignty_2: Export a JSON backup anytime from Settings.
onb_sovereignty_3: No telemetry at launch. Optional cloud sync will be E2EE and opt-in only.
onb_ready_desc: Your personalised French path is ready.
settings_sovereignty_desc: Everything you learn stays on this device unless you export it.
home_subtitle: French for Indian learners · A1 → C1
home_locked_hint: Complete the previous lesson to unlock.
delf_desc: Test all four skills and see if you'd pass.
lesson_locked_desc: Complete the previous lessons on your path first.
lesson_srs_note: These words are now in your review queue with spaced repetition.
progress_subtitle: All tracked on this device — no account.
onb_beta: பீட்டா — பிரெஞ்சு உள்ளடக்கம் AI ஆல் எழுதப்பட்டது. சொந்த மொழி பேசுபவரின் சரிபார்ப்பு நடந்து கொண்டிருக்கிறது.
review_nothing_desc: Complete a lesson to add cards to your review queue.
exam_intro_desc: Four skills, 25 points each (100 total). You pass with 50/100 — but scoring under 5/25 in any single skill fails the whole exam.
exam_eliminated: Failed on the note éliminatoire: a skill scored below 5/25.
review_fsrs_tip: Be honest — "Again" isn't failure; it's how FSRS learns your memory curve.
dictation_prompt: Listen and type what you hear
shadow_hint: Read along and repeat each word as it lights up.
settings_sovereignty_item_ondevice: Progress, reviews, and settings: on-device only
settings_sovereignty_doc: See docs/data-sovereignty.md in the project repo for the full sovereignty model.
settings_tts_desc: All pronunciation uses French voices only — never English TTS.
settings_storage_notice: No account, no cloud — your learning data lives only on this device. Export regularly to avoid losing progress.
settings_reset_confirm_desc: Erase all progress on this device? This cannot be undone.
settings_import_preview_warning: This will erase your current progress and replace it with the backup.
settings_notif_denied_hint: Notifications were not allowed. Enable them in browser settings to get revision reminders.
settings_notif_unsupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings_notif_enable_first: Enable notifications in browser settings first.
settings_persist_granted: Storage is now persistent — your data is protected from eviction.
settings_persist_denied: The browser did not grant persistent storage. Your data is still saved (best-effort).
settings_file_too_large: File is too large. Maximum backup size is {mb} MB.
sync_body: Create an encrypted file to move your progress to another device. It's encrypted with your passphrase — without it, nobody, including us, can read it.
sync_passphrase_hint: At least {min} characters. You'll need to enter the same passphrase on your other device.
sync_preview_title: Merge data from your other device?
sync_preview_body: This will add {reviews} reviews, {lessons} lessons, {cards} review cards, and {assessments} assessments. Nothing on this device will be deleted.
sync_wrong_passphrase: That passphrase doesn't match this file. Check for typos and try again.
checkpoint_intro_desc: உங்கள் பாதையின் அடுத்த அலகுகளைத் திறக்க தேர்ச்சி பெறுங்கள்.
fsrs_personalized_on: Personalized — tuned from {count} of your reviews, on this device only.
fsrs_personalized_off: Standard FSRS scheduling. Personalizes automatically after 500 reviews.
